Package org.mitre.synthea.helpers

Class ChartRenderer.MultiTableChartConfig

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.helpers.ChartRenderer.ChartConfig
org.mitre.synthea.helpers.ChartRenderer.MultiTableChartConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ChartRenderer
public static class ChartRenderer.MultiTableChartConfig extends ChartRenderer.ChartConfig
POJO configuration for a chart with data from a MultiTable.
